case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. JAMES EDWARD DARBY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,449.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT DARBY, JAMES EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.99) SERVED AUG-17-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DARBY, JAMES EDWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE-SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARBY, JAMES EDWARD $1,449.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,479.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.
